message:
fix: use sqlite_sidecar_path for backup import WAL/SHM/journal cleanup

Replace .with_extension() calls with sqlite_sidecar_path() helper
when computing WAL, SHM, and journal file paths during backup import.
The .with_extension() approach fails for databases with compound
extensions (e.g., "data.sqlite3" → "data.-wal" instead of
"data.sqlite3-wal").

Adds import_removes_sidecars_for_non_db_target_names test to verify
correct sidecar cleanup for .sqlite3 target databases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
